The canonical structured payload blob for an activity slide, containing all ACT-specific runtime fields plus the runtimeContractV1 envelope; the single source of truth for ACT interaction data - top-level duplicate keys are blocked by DB guard.
requiredness_lesson_player_supabase: required - player fails closed if absent or empty
notes: DB trigger blocks top-level/propsJson collision; preflight requires non-empty and valid runtimeContractV1 inside.

The versioned interaction contract nested inside propsJson that declares the activity's tool, command row controls, and active status - required for the player to mount the correct tool at runtime.
requiredness_lesson_player_supabase: required on create and update for all activity_slides
notes: Must contain contractVersion="v1", interaction.activity_row_tool (recognized tool), interaction.command_row_controls (array), interaction.status ("active"|"inactive"); validated at preflight and player contract boundary.
